name: Potato Croquettes Stuffed with Meat
recipeIngredient: a few grains of cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the milk or cream, butter, cheese, and seasonings to the mashed hot potatoes. Mix well until smooth.
2. Beat in the well-beaten egg yolks and let stand until cold.
3. Combine ground beef, onion, parsley, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
4. Flatten 1 tablespoon of potato mixture in your palm.
5. Place about 1 teaspoon of meat mixture in the center and roll into pear-shaped croquettes.
6. Roll each croquette first in flour, then in beaten egg, and again in flour.
7. Fry in butter or deep fat until golden brown.
4 servings.
